evals.prompt: Open my email in the browser that's already logged in and give me a detailed summary of the 10 most recent messages.
evals.expected_output: A per-message summary of the 10 newest emails, extracted via DOM/text and not a guess, after confirming the right window.
expectations: Identifies and acts on the correct already-open, logged-in browser window
Falls back from page-text to a DOM query if the message rows are not captured by plain text extraction
Summarizes each of the 10 messages from actually-extracted content rather than fabricating

evals.prompt: Find student ID 12345 in the grades spreadsheet open in my browser and tell me their final letter grade.
evals.expected_output: The correct letter grade for the requested ID, derived from the row's raw scores and the grading rule, after reading canvas/iframe content via screenshot.
expectations: Uses the provided ID to locate the specific row instead of guessing
Recognizes a canvas/iframe-rendered spreadsheet is unreadable by text/DOM and switches to a screenshot/vision tier
Re-derives the letter grade from raw scores and checks the boundary bucket (e.g. A vs A+)
